sentences.arabic: أَقَامَتِ الْمَدِينَةُ حَفْلَةً بِمُنَاسَبَةِ الْعِيدِ الْوَطَنِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Grad je priredio svečanost povodom nacionalnog praznika.
sentences.translationEn: The city held a celebration for the national holiday.

sentences.arabic: غَنَّى فَنَّانُونَ مَحَلِّيُّونَ أَمَامَ جُمْهُورٍ كَبِيرٍ.
sentences.translation: Lokalni umjetnici su pjevali pred velikom publikom.
sentences.translationEn: Local artists sang in front of a large audience.

sentences.arabic: شَاهَدَ النَّاسُ أَلْعَابَ نَارِيَّةً جَمِيلَةً فِي السَّمَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi su gledali lijepa vatrometa na nebu.
sentences.translationEn: People watched beautiful fireworks in the sky.

sentences.arabic: انْتَهَتِ الْحَفْلَةُ مُتَأَخِّرًا وَعَادَ النَّاسُ إِلَى بُيُوتِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Slavlje je završilo kasno i ljudi su se vratili kućama.
sentences.translationEn: The celebration ended late and people returned to their homes.
